guidelines.title: Management of Posttraumatic Stress Disorder and Acute Stress Disorder
guidelines.summary: VA/DoD clinician support guideline for acute stress disorder and PTSD management.

recommendations.recommendation_text: Trauma-focused psychotherapy should be considered a first-line treatment domain for many adults with PTSD, subject to clinical judgment and readiness.
recommendations.caution_notes: Confirm safety, dissociation burden, stabilization, and patient preference.

recommendations.recommendation_text: Medication decisions should be individualized and reviewed against contraindications, co-occurring disorders, and adverse-effect risks.
recommendations.evidence_basis: Guideline summary and pharmacologic interventions support material
recommendations.caution_notes: Not a prescribing directive; requires clinician verification.

guidelines.title: Post-traumatic stress disorder
guidelines.summary: NICE PTSD guideline covering recognition, assessment, treatment, and coordination of care.

recommendations.recommendation_text: PTSD assessment and care planning should consider symptom profile, functional impairment, and complex needs in a coordinated care context.
recommendations.caution_notes: Do not collapse complex PTSD and PTSD workflows without clinician review.

recommendations.recommendation_text: Drug treatment decisions for PTSD require careful indication review and should not displace psychologically focused care without a justified clinical rationale.
recommendations.caution_notes: Use as evidence support only; requires clinician judgment and contraindication review.
